overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through an industrial district in Night City. The player navigates from open streets past rusted metal buildings, through narrow graffiti-covered alleys with NPCs, into dark warehouse interiors with scaffolding, and back to outdoor industrial yards under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with rusted metal buildings and ventilation structures

events.description: character with glowing blue melee weapon walks across the path from left to right
turning left into narrower passage between green industrial structure and rusted buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial district, observing the rusted architecture and graffiti

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying glowing weapon crosses the path from left to right and exits frame

entered.detail: tall rusted metal structure with large circular ventilation fan and corrugated panels
futuristic silver vehicle parked on the street with yellow accents
metal guardrail running along the left side of the walkway
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large green metal industrial building with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial street with a rusted building featuring a large ventilation fan. A character with a glowing weapon crosses the player's path. The player turns left and walks along a curved asphalt path bordered by metal railings, passing a parked car and approaching a large green industrial structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial thoroughfare with distant factory smokestacks

events.description: exiting enclosed street into open area with expansive view of distant industrial complex and smokestacks
path curves gently to the left following the guardrail

agents.ego_description: walking along curved industrial road with expansive view of industrial skyline and smokestacks

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke visible against the blue sky
yellow construction vehicle or industrial equipment parked near the road
large green industrial structure with pipes connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the enclosed street into a wide-open industrial area with a clear view of distant smokestacks against the blue sky. The path curves left along a metal guardrail, passing yellow industrial equipment. The environment transitions from enclosed to expansive as the player approaches a narrow alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow graffiti-covered alley leading to NPC gathering

events.description: entering narrow alleyway with metal gate ahead and graffiti-covered walls
approaching group of people standing near industrial containers and barrels

agents.ego_description: proceeding through narrow alley toward a group of people gathered near containers

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near industrial containers and barrels

entered.detail: large metal gate structure blocking the far end of the alley
patches of dry grass and weeds growing through cracks in the concrete
orange and white industrial containers with warning stripes and text
large industrial pipes running horizontally across the alley overhead

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls and dry vegetation growing through the concrete. Overhead pipes run across the passage. The player approaches a metal gate where a group of NPCs are gathered near industrial containers and barrels, then passes through the group into a darker interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial warehouse interior with scaffolding transitioning to outdoor yard

events.description: entering dark industrial interior with artificial lighting and shadows
exiting dark building back into bright sunlight
moving into open industrial yard with scattered debris and metal structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through dark industrial building with scaffolding and emerging into outdoor industrial yard

entered.detail: yellow-orange metal scaffolding structure with stairs attached to building
red and blue industrial barrels stacked near the wall
external metal staircase with yellow railings
concrete blocks and barriers placed in the path

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark industrial warehouse interior with orange scaffolding and metal stairs. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadowy artificial light. The player continues through the building and exits back into sunlight, entering an open industrial yard with concrete barriers, scattered debris, and rusted metal structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an industrial district that shifts from enclosed streets to expansive yards and dark interiors. It begins on a street beside a rusted building with a large ventilation fan, moving past a character with a glowing weapon and along a curved asphalt path bordered by metal railings. As the camera emerges from the enclosed street, the environment opens into a wide industrial area with yellow equipment and distant smokestacks under a blue sky before narrowing again into a graffiti-covered alley with overhead pipes. The scene then shifts from the bright outdoors into a dark warehouse interior filled with orange scaffolding and metal stairs, where the lighting transitions from sunlight to shadowy artificial tones. Finally, the camera exits the building and returns to the bright sunlight of an open industrial yard characterized by concrete barriers, scattered debris, and rusted metal structures.
